channel.title: Blog on Cozy Cafe Corner
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Cozy Cafe Corner

item.title: Secure Remote Access with WireGuard and OpenWrt
item.description:
Overview

This project focused on building a secure and flexible remote access solution using WireGuard and OpenWrt.

The goal was to enable reliable remote access to devices and services while maintaining network security and allowing selected traffic to be routed through a VPN connection when needed.

item.title: Small Business IT Infrastructure: Practical Setup and Best Practices
item.description:
Why IT Infrastructure Matters for Small Businesses

For small businesses, IT infrastructure is not just about having computers and internet access. It directly affects productivity, customer service, security, and business continuity.

item.title: System Troubleshooting & Recovery in Critical Business Environments
item.description:
Overview

In business environments, system issues can directly affect daily operations, employee productivity, and customer service.

Over the years, I have worked on troubleshooting and recovering a wide range of production issues, including application failures, system instability, network interruptions, and infrastructure-related incidents.

item.title: When Virtual Machine Time Drift Causes Production Failures
item.description:
When Virtual Machine Time Drift Causes Production Failures

In modern infrastructure, virtualization has made deployment faster, more flexible, and easier to scale. However, it also introduces subtle risks that are often overlooked until they cause real outages. One of those risks is virtual machine time drift or temporary clock inconsistency.

item.title: Three Ways to Organize Contents in a Mobile App
item.description: List-Detail View and Cards are common modes for show content pages for mobile websites & apps. I summarized 3 forms in different types that are I have used in my projects.

item.title: Install and Use Docker on ( DigitalOcean) VPS
item.description:
Why use Docker

Docker can efficiently deploy a service environment, such as completing a web site in a few minutes, including a web server, front end, and database for hosting a web site. Meanwhile, avoid conflicting dependencies by using separate containers for each component of an application. Docker makes it easy to maintain and transfer, especially when deployed in the cloud.
